name: insert_rows
description: Insert one or more new rows into a Supabase database table. Supports bulk inserts by passing an array of objects. Use the Prefer header to control upsert behavior (insert-or-update on conflict) and to request the inserted rows back in the response.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: The name of the database table to insert into.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The row data as a JSON object, or an array of objects for bulk insert. Column names are keys.

parameters.name: Prefer
parameters.description: Set to 'return=representation' to return the inserted row(s). Add 'resolution=merge-duplicates' for upsert.

parameters.name: on_conflict
parameters.description: Column(s) to detect conflicts on for upsert behavior (used with Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates).
